differences.title: 1. GRAPH DEFINITION
differences.leftDesc: Define graphs on-the-fly during execution for easier debugging.
differences.rightDesc: Define graphs first, then execute for optimization and deployment.

differences.title: 2. EASE OF USE
differences.leftDesc: Feels more like native Python, easier for beginners.
differences.rightDesc: Requires learning TensorFlow's specific API and concepts.

differences.title: 3. PRODUCTION DEPLOYMENT
differences.leftDesc: Gaining traction, but deployment tools are evolving.
differences.rightDesc: Extensive ecosystem for production deployment (TF Serving, Lite).

differences.title: 4. COMMUNITY SUPPORT
differences.leftDesc: Popular in research and academia, vibrant community.
differences.rightDesc: Backed by Google, massive industry adoption and resources.

differences.title: 5. HARDWARE ACCELERATION
differences.leftDesc: Supports various hardware including GPUs and TPUs.
differences.rightDesc: Excellent optimization for Google's TPUs and broad hardware.

differences.title: 7. MODEL SHARING
differences.leftDesc: Centralized place for pre-trained models and utilities.
differences.rightDesc: Comprehensive repository for shared models and datasets.
